text: ELINT News RT @laraseligman : Iran still has thousands of ballistic missiles in its arsenal that it could use by retrieving launchers from underground storage areas, according to American officials familiar with U.S. intelligence assessments. https://www.wsj.com/world/middle-east/iran-has-thousands-of-missiles-and-could-retrieve-launchers-u-s-intelligence-finds-eaa230ec?st=VX9bT4&reflink=article_copyURL_share tweet
text_zh: ELINT News 转发 @laraseligman ：据熟悉美国情报评估的美国官员称，伊朗的武库中仍有数千枚弹道导弹，可以通过从地下储存区取出发射装置来使用。 https://www.wsj.com/world/middle-east/iran-has-thousands-of-missiles-and-could-retrieve-launchers-u-s-intelligence-finds-eaa230ec?st=VX9bT4&reflink=article_copyURL_share 推文

text: 🇷🇺 ☦️ Russian fighters receive special Easter breads for Easter ℹ️ Kulich is a traditional Russian Easter bread baked for Orthodox Easter. It’s tall, slightly sweet, and made with butter, eggs, and dried fruits like raisins. After baking, it’s topped with white sugar glaze and often taken to church to be blessed. Beyond being a dessert, kulich symbolizes the presence of Jesus Christ at the Easter table, as well as His Resurrection and the idea of life overcoming death. It’s also a home version of a sacred church bread representing the body of Christ. The tall shape reflects the transition from earthly to heavenly, and the white glaze stands for purity. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇷🇺 ☦️ 俄罗斯战士收到复活节特别面包 ℹ️ 库利奇（Kulich）是一种传统的俄罗斯复活节面包，专为东正教复活节烘焙。它很高，略带甜味，由黄油、鸡蛋和葡萄干等干果制成。烘烤后，上面覆盖着白糖霜，通常会被带到教堂祈福。库利奇不仅是一种甜点，还象征着耶稣基督在复活节餐桌上的存在，以及祂的复活和生命战胜死亡的理念。它也是一种神圣教堂面包的家庭版本，代表基督的身体。高耸的形状反映了从尘世到天堂的过渡，白色的糖霜代表纯洁。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇱🇧🇮🇱 MTV: Two Israeli airstrikes targeted the towns of Toul and Jibchit in southern Lebanon. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 Fires raging in Toul, Nabatieh region, after an Israeli airstrike on the town early this Saturday morning. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇱🇧🇮🇱 MTV：两次以色列空袭袭击了黎巴嫩南部的图尔（Toul）和吉布奇特（Jibchit）镇。 @wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 本周六清晨，以色列空袭图尔镇后，纳巴泰地区（Nabatieh region）的图尔燃起大火。 @wfwitness

text: 🐻 Grab a coffee and read all the key news you might have missed in the past 24 hours! ➡️ Russia is using new robots for demining in the SMO zone ➡️ Russia attacked the energy and port infrastructure in Odessa ➡️ Zelensky announces Ukraine will enter a difficult period of pressure from Russia on the front and the US in negotiations by September, and wants NATO bases in Ukraine . Oh - and claims that they shot down Iraninan drones in the Middle East ➡️ Budanov laments that Ukrainians want victory but don't want to go to the front ➡️ Russia and Cuba are discussing the resumption of flights ➡️ British sources say the Russian frigate Admiral Grigorovich escorted two “shadow tankers” through the English Channel on Wednesday. ➡️ Former Secretary of State John Kerry says Netanyahu asked other US presidents to strike Iran - but only Trump agreed ➡️ The FSB has detained three more members of Shamil Basayev and Khattab's gangs who were involved in attacks on Russian military personnel in 1999–2000 (a good reminder for Zelensky and the gang) ➡️ MAGA influencers are turning on Israel ➡️ And not just MAGA influencers - Spanish PM continues to criticize Israel , Slovenia joins Spain’s effort to suspend the EU–Israel Association Agreement - and Netanyahu says that countries that “wage a diplomatic war” against Israel will pay “an immediate price.” ➡️ Kuomintang leader Zheng Liwen of Taiwan meets with Xi Jinping and says that they cannot let Taiwan become a battlefield ➡️ Chinese FM Wang Yi me t with Kim Jong Un ➡️ Trump says they will open the strait "one way or the other" , and we still don't know if Trump wants no enrichment from Iran, or no nuclear weapons ➡️ Al Jazeera published exclusive footage of the strikes on Ras Laffan Industrial City, located north of Doha, Qatar. ➡️ Iranian delegation arrives in Pakistan for negotiations with the Epstein Coalition , "has goodwill, but no trust" , brings personal belongings of the children killed in the recent strikes 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🐻 喝杯咖啡，阅读过去24小时内你可能错过的所有重要新闻！ ➡️ 俄罗斯正在特别军事行动区使用新型机器人进行排雷 ➡️ 俄罗斯袭击了敖德萨的能源和港口基础设施 ➡️ 泽连斯基宣布，乌克兰将在9月前进入一个困难时期，面临来自俄罗斯在前线和美国在谈判中的压力，并希望乌克兰境内有北约基地。哦，还声称他们在伊朗在中东击落了无人机 ➡️ 布达诺夫感叹乌克兰人想要胜利，但不想上前线 ➡️ 俄罗斯和古巴正在讨论恢复航班 ➡️ 英国消息人士称，俄罗斯护卫舰“格里戈里·波特金海军上将”号（Admiral Grigorovich）周三护送两艘“影子油轮”穿过英吉利海峡。 ➡️ 前国务卿约翰·克里表示，内塔尼亚胡曾要求其他美国总统打击伊朗，但只有特朗普同意 ➡️ 联邦安全局（FSB）又拘留了三名沙米尔·巴萨耶夫（Shamil Basayev）和哈塔卜（Khattab）团伙的成员，他们参与了1999-2000年对俄罗斯军事人员的袭击（这对泽连斯基和他的团伙是一个很好的提醒） ➡️ MAGA（让美国再次伟大）影响者正在背离以色列 ➡️ 不仅仅是MAGA影响者——西班牙首相继续批评以色列，斯洛文尼亚加入西班牙的行列，试图暂停欧盟-以色列联系国协定——而内塔尼亚胡表示，对以色列“发动外交战”的国家将付出“即时代价”。 ➡️ 台湾国民党领导人郑丽文会见习近平，表示不能让台湾成为战场 ➡️ 中国外交部长王毅会见了金正恩 ➡️ 特朗普表示他们将“以某种方式”开放海峡，我们仍然不知道特朗普是希望伊朗不进行浓缩，还是没有核武器 ➡️ 半岛电视台发布了卡塔尔多哈以北拉斯拉凡工业城（Ras Laffan Industrial City）遭袭的独家画面。 ➡️ 伊朗代表团抵达巴基斯坦与爱泼斯坦联盟（Epstein Coalition）进行谈判，“有善意，但没有信任”，带来了在最近袭击中丧生的儿童的个人物品 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: Michael A. Horowitz RT @laurnorman : On a more serious note, my recent profile of @mb_ghalibaf . https://www.wsj.com/world/middle-east/iran-who-is-mohammad-bagher-ghalibaf-3c3ecf3e tweet

text: WarMonitor The Artemis II astronauts have exited the capsule onto a recovery raft, where they’re secured and lifted by helicopter to the ship’s deck before heading for a more thorough medical evaluation. It really is an amazing thing to see. https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2042789812311089572/video/1 tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 阿耳忒弥斯2号（Artemis II）宇航员已经离开太空舱进入回收筏，在那里他们被固定并由直升机吊起至船甲板，然后进行更彻底的医疗评估。这确实是一件令人惊叹的事情。 https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2042789812311089572/video/1 推文

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 🇵🇸 Reuters : The Board of Peace has received only a fraction of the $17 billion pledged for the reconstruction of Gaza, hindering the US president's plan for the region's future. The funding pledges, made by ten countries, have not been fulfilled, with only the United Arab Emirates, Morocco, and the US contributing so far, totaling under $1 billion. The lack of funding has prevented the committee from entering Gaza, and disarmament talks between Hamas and Israel remain in deadlock, with Israel demanding Hamas lay down its arms before withdrawing its troops. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 🇵🇸 路透社：和平委员会仅收到为加沙重建承诺的170亿美元中的一小部分，阻碍了美国总统对该地区未来的计划。十个国家做出的资金承诺尚未兑现，目前只有阿拉伯联合酋长国、摩洛哥和美国做出了贡献，总额不到10亿美元。资金的缺乏阻止了委员会进入加沙，哈马斯与以色列之间的裁军谈判陷入僵局，以色列要求哈马斯在撤军前放下武器。 @wfwitness

text: Jebsheet tonight repeatedly from a new Israeli aggression

text: OSINTdefender All four crew members, NASA astronaut Reid Wiseman, Artemis II commander, NASA astronaut Victor Glover, Artemis II pilot, NASA astronaut Christina Koch, Artemis II mission specialist, and Canadian Space Agency (CSA) astronaut Jeremy Hansen, Artemis II mission specialist have now exited the crew module and are now in the inflatable “front porch.” tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 所有四名机组人员，阿耳忒弥斯2号指挥官、NASA宇航员里德·怀斯曼（Reid Wiseman），阿耳忒弥斯2号飞行员、NASA宇航员维克多·格洛弗（Victor Glover），阿耳忒弥斯2号任务专家、NASA宇航员克里斯蒂娜·科赫（Christina Koch），以及阿耳忒弥斯2号任务专家、加拿大航天局（CSA）宇航员杰里米·汉森（Jeremy Hansen），现在都已经离开了乘员舱，目前在充气的“前廊”中。推文

text: Disclose.tv NOW - All four Artemis II astronauts emerge from spacecraft for first time since moon launch on April 1st. https://twitter.com/disclosetv/status/2042779226202358002/video/1 tweet
text_zh: Disclose.tv 现在——所有四名阿耳忒弥斯2号宇航员自4月1日登月以来首次走出航天器。 https://twitter.com/disclosetv/status/2042779226202358002/video/1 推文

text: OSINTdefender 3 crew members have now exited the crew module. https://twitter.com/sentdefender/status/2042778237802078288/video/1 tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 3名机组人员现已离开乘员舱。 https://twitter.com/sentdefender/status/2042778237802078288/video/1 推文

text: OSINTdefender RT @TheIntelFrog : It appears that the early warning radar in Qatar was hit by multiple Iranian drones causing more than superficial damage. Multiple hits in the same attack indicates that if air defenses were present, they were overwhelmed or otherwise ineffective. Photos published by Al Jazeera for the first time reveal damage caused by Iranian strikes on the U.S.-made AN/FPS-132 Block 5 (SSPARS) ballistic missile early warning radar in Qatar. The damage appears to be more extensive than what is visible in satellite imagery. https://twitter.com/EGYOSINT/status/2042702139818905756/photo/1 - Egypt's Intel Observer tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 转发 @TheIntelFrog ：看来卡塔尔的预警雷达被多架伊朗无人机击中，造成了不仅仅是表面上的损坏。在同一次袭击中多次命中表明，如果存在防空系统，它们要么被压制，要么无效。半岛电视台首次发布的照片揭示了伊朗袭击卡塔尔美制AN/FPS-132 Block 5 (SSPARS) 弹道导弹预警雷达造成的损坏。损坏程度似乎比卫星图像中看到的更为严重。 https://twitter.com/EGYOSINT/status/2042702139818905756/photo/1 - 埃及情报观察员 推文

text: WSJ: Both Saudi Arabia and the UAE are refusing to ship oil through the strait while it is under Iranian control. This is an unofficial oil embargo that will lead to higher oil prices and force others to intervene, according to Gulf officials
text_zh: 华尔街日报：沙特阿拉伯和阿联酋都拒绝在海峡处于伊朗控制下时通过该海峡运输石油。据海湾官员称，这是一项非官方的石油禁运，将导致油价上涨并迫使其他国家进行干预

text: Life is a miracle by God and a sacred journey to make Only Jews destroy lives and steal futures without any regards
text_zh: 生命是上帝创造的奇迹，是一段神圣的旅程。只有犹太人肆无忌惮地摧毁生命和窃取未来

text: CBS News: The U.S. has lost 24 MQ-9 Reaper drones during the Iran war. "The drones represent a loss of about $720 million."
text_zh: 哥伦比亚广播公司新闻（CBS News）：美国在伊朗战争中损失了24架MQ-9“死神”无人机。“这些无人机代表了约7.2亿美元的损失。”

text: OSINTdefender All four astronauts of the Artemis II mission have been medically cleared as “green.” https://twitter.com/sentdefender/status/2042773827990499622/video/1 tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 阿耳忒弥斯2号任务的所有四名宇航员已被医疗部门宣布为“绿色”（健康）。 https://twitter.com/sentdefender/status/2042773827990499622/video/1 推文

text: OSINTdefender A view inside the crew module as personnel conduct assessments of the Artemis II crew. https://twitter.com/sentdefender/status/2042771802523316348/video/1 tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 乘员舱内部视角，工作人员正在对阿耳忒弥斯2号机组人员进行评估。 https://twitter.com/sentdefender/status/2042771802523316348/video/1 推文

text: OSINTdefender U.S. President Donald J. Trump has posted a statement on his Truth Social app congratulating the Artemis II crew on a successful mission. https://twitter.com/sentdefender/status/2042770632702582936/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 美国总统唐纳德·J·特朗普在“真实社交”（Truth Social）应用程序上发表声明，祝贺阿耳忒弥斯2号机组人员任务成功。 https://twitter.com/sentdefender/status/2042770632702582936/photo/1 推文

text: OSINTdefender Personnel are now conducting assessments of the crew inside the module after the hatch was opened. They will be exiting one-by-one imminently. They have now opened the side hatch of the crew module as U.S. Navy divers aid in the process. The Artemis II crew will exit one-by-one. https://twitter.com/sentdefender/status/2042769357625770400/video/1 - OSINTdefender tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 在舱门打开后，工作人员现在正在舱内对机组人员进行评估。他们即将一个接一个地离开。他们现在已经打开了乘员舱的侧舱门，美国海军潜水员正在协助这一过程。阿耳忒弥斯2号机组人员将一个接一个地离开。 https://twitter.com/sentdefender/status/2042769357625770400/video/1 - OSINTdefender 推文

text: OSINTdefender They have now opened the side hatch of the crew module as U.S. Navy divers aid in the process. The Artemis II crew will exit one-by-one. https://twitter.com/sentdefender/status/2042769357625770400/video/1 tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 他们现在已经打开了乘员舱的侧舱门，美国海军潜水员正在协助这一过程。阿耳忒弥斯2号机组人员将一个接一个地离开。 https://twitter.com/sentdefender/status/2042769357625770400/video/1 推文

text: The Spectator Index Kamala Harris says she is 'thinking about' running for US president in 2028. https://twitter.com/spectatorindex/status/2042768222219571201/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: 旁观者指数（The Spectator Index） 卡玛拉·哈里斯（Kamala Harris）表示，她正在“考虑”参加2028年美国总统竞选。 https://twitter.com/spectatorindex/status/2042768222219571201/photo/1 推文

text: WarMonitor Recovery crews are circling the capsule, inspecting heat shield and structure before giving the all clear. The crew will still stay inside for some time before exiting. https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2042767669263315112/video/1 tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 回收人员正在绕着太空舱盘旋，在给出一切正常的信号前检查隔热罩和结构。机组人员在离开前仍将在里面待一段时间。 https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2042767669263315112/video/1 推文

text: Pakistan's air force (pilots) have a 4-0 record in air-air combat against the Israeli air force (3 during 1967 war and 1 during the 1973 war).
text_zh: 巴基斯坦空军（飞行员）在与以色列空军的空对空作战中拥有4-0的战绩（1967年战争期间3次，1973年战争期间1次）。

text: We lost 13 of our finest from the Lebanese state security forces in a direct attack on a government building owned by the Ministry of Interior and the Lebanese government The Lebanese president Aoun and Lebanese Prime Minister Nawaf avenged their blood by talking to their killers, the Israelis against all laws and norms and everything Two days after a grave massacre against Lebanese civilians, killing and injuring 2,000 Tarhini, Malah, Harb, Ayoub, Qanso, Fakih, Haidar, Reslan, Dawi, Bdier, Meqdad, and Hijazi
text_zh: 我们失去了13名黎巴嫩国家安全部队中最优秀的成员，他们在一场针对内政部和黎巴嫩政府拥有的政府大楼的直接袭击中丧生。黎巴嫩总统奥恩（Aoun）和黎巴嫩总理纳瓦夫（Nawaf）通过与他们的杀手——以色列人——交谈来为他们的血报仇，这违背了所有法律、规范和一切。在针对黎巴嫩平民的严重屠杀两天后，造成2000人死伤，Tarhini, Malah, Harb, Ayoub, Qanso, Fakih, Haidar, Reslan, Dawi, Bdier, Meqdad 和 Hijazi

text: Khaldeh,1982
text_zh: 卡尔德（Khaldeh），1982年

text: ELINT News RT @julianbarnes : US Officials: Iran cannot find all the mines they laid in the Strait of Hormuz and so cannot open up the waterway further. tweet
text_zh: ELINT News 转发 @julianbarnes ：美国官员：伊朗无法找到他们在霍尔木兹海峡布设的所有水雷，因此无法进一步开放航道。推文

text: ELINT News RT @FSeifikaran : Exclusive report by Al Jazeera shows parts of the wreckage of two Iranian Su-24 fighter jets that were shot down by Qatari Air Force, March 2. The bodies of the Iranian pilots have not yet been found. https://twitter.com/FSeifikaran/status/2042760175593890092/video/1 tweet
text_zh: ELINT News 转发 @FSeifikaran ：半岛电视台的独家报道显示了3月2日被卡塔尔空军击落的两架伊朗苏-24战斗机的残骸部分。伊朗飞行员的尸体尚未找到。 https://twitter.com/FSeifikaran/status/2042760175593890092/video/1 推文

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 🇵🇰 CNN: High-stakes negotiations between the U.S. and Iran in Islamabad on Saturday are expected to begin indirectly before shifting to direct talks later in the day. Officials said both sides will likely first agree on the agenda through Pakistani mediators, before moving to face-to-face discussions as diplomacy progresses. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 🇵🇰 CNN：周六在伊斯兰堡举行的美伊高风险谈判预计将先进行间接谈判，随后在当天晚些时候转向直接对话。官员们表示，双方可能会先通过巴基斯坦调解人就议程达成一致，然后再随着外交进展转向面对面的讨论。 @wfwitness

text: 🇺🇸 Trump says: "No nuclear weapons." Fox News says: "No enrichment, period." So which one is it? Those are two different things. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇸 特朗普说：“没有核武器。”福克斯新闻说：“没有浓缩，句号。”那么到底是哪一个？那是两码事。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡🇱🇧🇮🇱 Hezbollah announced at 01:40 on April 11 that they carried out a drone strike targeting Israeli forces inside a house in Chamaa, reporting direct hits. @wfwitness" ⚡ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 Hezbollah announced at 00:40 and 01:15 on April 11 that they launched rocket attacks targeting the settlements of Kiryat Shmona, Metula, and Misgav Am, as well as Israeli military infrastructure in Safed. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡🇱🇧🇮🇱 真主党于4月11日01:40宣布，他们对沙马（Chamaa）一所房屋内的以色列军队进行了无人机袭击，报告直接命中。 @wfwitness” ⚡ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 真主党于4月11日00:40和01:15宣布，他们发动了火箭袭击，目标是谢莫纳镇（Kiryat Shmona）、梅图拉（Metula）和米斯加夫阿姆（Misgav Am）定居点，以及萨法德（Safed）的以色列军事基础设施。 @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 WSJ: The U.S. continues to deploy troops to the Middle East as the U.S. and Iran renew negotiations this weekend. Additional fighter jets and attack planes are being transferred to the region alongside 1,500-2,000 troops from the 82nd Airborne Division. Additional Marine and Naval forces are enroute to the region as well. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 华尔街日报：随着美国和伊朗本周末恢复谈判，美国继续向中东部署军队。额外的战斗机和攻击机正被转移到该地区，同时还有来自第82空降师的1500-2000名士兵。额外的海军陆战队和海军部队也正在前往该地区。 @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇸🪐🚀 NASA shares a photo of the Milky Way galaxy taken by Artemis II astronauts. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🌕 🚀 Artemis II returns to Earth and splashes down near San Diego after a successful trip around the moon. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇸🪐🚀 NASA分享了一张由阿耳忒弥斯2号宇航员拍摄的银河系照片。 @wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🌕 🚀 阿耳忒弥斯2号在成功绕月飞行后返回地球，并在圣地亚哥附近溅落。 @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇵🇸 Reports in Palestinian media indicate that around six people, likely Hamas-police operatives, were killed in an Israeli airstrike in near the Al-Bureij camp, central Gaza Strip. The IDF has yet to confirm the strike. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇵🇸 巴勒斯坦媒体报道称，在加沙地带中部布雷吉营地（Al-Bureij camp）附近的一次以色列空袭中，约有六人死亡，可能是哈马斯警察人员。以色列国防军尚未证实此次袭击。 @wfwitness

text: Despite the lies told by the Lebanese president that the talks are for a ceasefire, The Israeli ambassador to Washington: In today's conversation, Israel agreed to a follow-up meeting on Tuesday to reach a peace agreement with Lebanon, but did not agree to discuss a ceasefire with Hezbollah. The bastard Aoun should be in Pakistan directly talking to the master: The U.S not Israel
text_zh: 尽管黎巴嫩总统谎称谈判是为了停火，但以色列驻华盛顿大使表示：在今天的谈话中，以色列同意在周二举行后续会议以达成与黎巴嫩的和平协议，但不同意讨论与真主党的停火。那个混蛋奥恩应该直接在巴基斯坦与主人交谈：美国，而不是以色列

text: ↩️ Reply to Middle East Spectator — MES: "—❗️🇮🇷/🇵🇰/🇺🇸 NEW: Pakistan has released a list of names from the Iranian delegation It consists of 86 officials, experts, and media personnel. Some important names that are attending, which weren’t mentioned in media extensively, are Baqeri Kani, deputy of…" 🇮🇷 Iranian Negotiating Team is organized into five committees: ➡️ General Committee — led by Parliament Speaker Qalibaf ➡️ Political Committee — led by Foreign Minister Araqchi ➡️ Military Committee — led by Defense Council Chairman Ahmadian ➡️ Economic Committee — led by Central Bank Governor Hemmati ➡️ Legal Committee — led by Deputy Foreign Ministers Baqaei and Gharibabadi 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 中东旁观者 — MES：“—❗️🇮🇷/🇵🇰/🇺🇸 新消息：巴基斯坦发布了一份伊朗代表团名单，由86名官员、专家和媒体人员组成。一些出席的重要人物，在媒体上没有被广泛提及，是Baqeri Kani，副……” 🇮🇷 伊朗谈判小组分为五个委员会： ➡️ 总委员会 — 由议会议长卡利巴夫（Qalibaf）领导 ➡️ 政治委员会 — 由外交部长阿拉格齐（Araqchi）领导 ➡️ 军事委员会 — 由国防委员会主席艾哈迈迪安（Ahmadian）领导 ➡️ 经济委员会 — 由中央银行行长赫马蒂（Hemmati）领导 ➡️ 法律委员会 — 由副外交部长Baqaei和Gharibabadi领导 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ↩️ Reply to Middle East Spectator — MES: "The delegation will then meet with U.S. officials if it is confirmed that preconditions have been met.’" We will not go to Pakistan until preconditions met Then We won't meet the Americans until we get the preconditions Later? We won't put the pen on the paper of the deal without the preconditions..
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 中东旁观者 — MES：“如果确认满足了先决条件，代表团随后将与美国官员会面。” 在满足先决条件之前，我们不会去巴基斯坦。然后，在得到先决条件之前，我们不会与美国人会面。以后？没有先决条件，我们不会在协议上签字..
